Title: Bold Blue Color Block Graphic T-Shirt for Men and Women
Description:
Showcase your style with this striking color block graphic tee. Featuring a vibrant, solid blue square that prominently displays the hexadecimal color code #2196f3 and the number '24', this shirt is a unique piece for graphic enthusiasts and minimalists alike.

The bold, clean design makes it versatile for various occasions, from casual outings to creative gatherings. Printed on a comfortable, soft-feel t-shirt fabric, it offers all-day wearability.

  • Style: Modern and Graphic (Color Pop)
  • Material: Premium, breathable cotton blend for comfort.
  • Fit: Unisex, designed to flatter all body types.
  • Ideal Gift: Perfect for art students, designers, graphic designers, or anyone with an appreciation for bold aesthetics.

Whether you're attending a themed event or simply adding a pop of color to your everyday wardrobe, this tee makes a confident statement.
